evidence.text: “The purpose of our communities is to help knowledge owners and users collaborate, and there’s always a moderator between the two,” explains Saito. “Moderators review, approve, and disseminate knowledge so that it’s systemized and of high quality. We’ve systemized over 1,000 use cases within Hitachi into about 200 units of knowledge.”
